title: ‘A record of failure’: what’s in the first part of Alan Milburn’s Neet report?
description: The former minister paints damning picture of structural issues affecting 1 million young people in the UK
content:
1. This is a very significant and increasing problem
About 1 million young people across the UK are not in jobs, training or education – about one in eight – and things are getting worse, both absolutely and relatively. As Milburn notes, a decade ago... [5216 chars]

title: France overturns law classing people as property - 178 years after it abolished slavery
description: National assembly votes to repeal Code Noir under which enslaved people were beaten, raped and killed
content:
For almost 180 years after France abolished slavery, the Code Noir (Black Code) allowing enslaved humans to be treated as property and worked, beaten, sold, raped or killed, remained in place.
On Thursday, the country’s bitterly divided national asse... [3765 chars]

title: SAS not investigated over war crime allegations amid morale fears, inquiry hears
description: This meant military police did not learn for years of allegations of extra-judicial killings.
content:
A former chief of staff of UK Special Forces has told a public inquiry he believed war crimes allegations against the SAS were not referred to military police out of concern an investigation could disrupt operations and negatively affect morale.
The ... [5546 chars]

title: Afghan president voiced concern over civilians killed by SAS troops, inquiry told
description: Newly released evidence from inquiry into 80 deaths shows Afghan partner forces no longer willing to work alongside British by 2011
content:
Concerns about the number of Afghan civilians being killed by British special forces in the early part of the last decade prompted the country’s then president to make a “muscular” complaint to Nato commanders fighting the Taliban.
